description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a robust, angular black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock and a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family. The front sight is a post type, and the rear sight is mounted on the receiver, both constructed from metal. The barrel is standard length and ends with a simple muzzle device, likely a slant compensator or flash hider. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and pins securing the wooden and metal components. The finish is a mix of matte black metal and reddish-brown wood, giving it a rugged, functional appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged black metal rifle with reddish-brown wooden stock, handguard, and grip, featuring a curved magazine and iron sights. The design is utilitarian and robust, typical of an AK-47 style weapon.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, but from the other side, with the magazine curve and wooden elements visible.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
